description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single test stage. Add a unittest job that runs in the maven:3.5-jdk-8 Docker image, executes the command mvn test, and always collects the generated test reports. Configure the job to publish HTML reports from target/surefire-reports/TEST-*.html and JUnit XML reports from target/surefire-reports/TEST-*.xml and target/failsafe-reports/TEST-*.xml as artifacts.
